home.title: Firfita — Custom Vinyl Record Cutting in Georgia
home.description: Custom vinyl record cutting service in Tbilisi, Georgia. We cut your music onto 7", 10" and 12" vinyl records — from one-off copies to short runs. Fast turnaround, premium sound.

order.title: Order a Vinyl Record
order.description: Order your custom vinyl record online: choose size, color, quantity and artwork. From a single copy to short runs, cut in Tbilisi, Georgia.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Clear, straightforward pricing for custom vinyl records: 7" from 55 GEL, 10" from 80 GEL, 12" from 100 GEL. Discounts on larger runs.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: Vinyl cutting for music lovers, DJs and musicians — one-off copies, short runs, custom stickers and printed sleeves.

service.title: Who are Vinyl records great for?
service.p1: For every music enthusiast who just want to have any musical piece in a physical form.
service.p2: For DJs who want to play any track on vinyl, including unreleased music, in their vinyl-only sets.
service.p3: For musicians and producers who want to bring their music into physical form.

oneOff.title: ONE-OFF COPY
oneOff.desc: We cut from one-off copy to short runs

about.title: ABOUT US
about.body: We are music enthusiasts who live for records, grooves and the sound of a needle hitting wax. We cut vinyls. One-offs, vinyl records, short runs. Your music, turned into a record you can actually spin. For DJs, producers, labels, anyone tired of their tracks living in a folder.

Order.title: CONFIGURE YOUR VINYL RECORD
Order.name: First Name

size7.title: 7" SINGLE
size7.desc: Perfect for singles, maximum music length on the side — 7 min.

size10.title: 10" EP
size10.desc: Extended play format, maximum music length on each side — 11 min.

size12.title: 12" LP
size12.desc: Full album experience, maximum music length on each side — 15 min.

Order.pasteLink: Paste link for sticker artwork (WeTransfer, Google Drive...)
Order.outerSleeveFormatInfo1: Artwork must be JPEG or PNG
Order.stickerFormatInfo: Artwork must be in JPEG / PNG / PDF format.
Order.termsCheckboxLabel: I confirm that I own or have permission for the copyrights of the music to be ordered and I take full responsibility for them.
Order.termsModalP1: 1. By placing an order, the user confirms that they own or have legally obtained all necessary rights, licenses, and permissions for the audio or musical material submitted to be cut on the dubplate.
Order.termsModalP2: 2. FIRFITA provides only physical cutting services and is not responsible for the content of the material provided by the user or its copyrights.
Order.termsModalP3: 3. The user takes full legal responsibility for any claim, lawsuit, or damage arising as a result of copyright or related rights infringement, and agrees to fully compensate any expenses or damages incurred by the service for this reason.
Order.termsModalP4: 4. The service reserves the right to refuse to fulfill the order if there is a reasonable suspicion of rights violation or illegal content.
Order.termsModalP5: 5. The cut dubplate is intended for the user's personal use and does not grant them any copyright or commercial distribution rights to the recorded music.
